lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: How can you see properly with such tiny little eyes?

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Everyone's talking about how you helped Zanik save the city! You're a hero!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Have you visited the market? There are visitors selling foods from all over the surface there. It's so exotic!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Well, I suppose it wouldn't be exotic for you, since you're from the surface.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: But you should check it out anyway. Maybe you could sell some of your food. Everyone's crazy about surface food at the moment.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: So, what do you think of our city, surface-dweller?

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: That, surface-dweller, was the right answer.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Well, it beats crawling around on the surface with nothing above your head!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: What's it like on the surface? It sounds scary to me, having nothing above my head.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: I'm still not sure it would be for me, though.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Never mind, you can stay down here now!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: What do you think you're doing?
